=== Refactor Application Results ===

=== [R1] Refactor 0: "Wrap with pipe" ===

--- file:///.src/structuralTypeToSchema_union.ts ---
// refactor: 4:13-4:19
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

export type pipe(Status) = "pending" | "active" | "completed"


=== [R1] Refactor 1: "Generate Effect.Schema from type" ===

--- file:///.src/structuralTypeToSchema_union.ts ---
// refactor: 4:13-4:19
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

export const Status = Schema.Union([Schema.Literal("pending"), Schema.Literal("active"), Schema.Literal("completed")]);

export type Status = "pending" | "active" | "completed"


=== [R1] Refactor 2: "Generate Schema.Class from type" ===

--- file:///.src/structuralTypeToSchema_union.ts ---
// refactor: 4:13-4:19
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

export const Status = Schema.Union([Schema.Literal("pending"), Schema.Literal("active"), Schema.Literal("completed")]);

export type Status = "pending" | "active" | "completed"


=== [R1] Refactor 3: "Refactor to Schema (Recursive Structural)" ===

--- file:///.src/structuralTypeToSchema_union.ts ---
// refactor: 4:13-4:19
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

export const Status = Schema.Union([Schema.Literal("active"), Schema.Literal("completed"), Schema.Literal("pending")]);

export type Status = "pending" | "active" | "completed"
